programme.title: Cybermutt
programme.desc: The powerful dog Rex is injured by a car while rescuing a young scientist from being run over. Feeling responsible for the condition of Rex the scientist uses his skill as a prosthetics inventor to give the dog a new, super-power body.

programme.title: Love and Honor
programme.desc: While fighting in Vietnam, Dalton hears his girlfriend has dumped him so decides to fly to get her back. AWOL from the war zone, he has seven days to get back to the US, change his girlfriend's mind and make it back to Vietnam without anyone noticing

programme.title: Benji
programme.desc: Two school kids strike up a friendship with an orphaned puppy named Benji. When danger befalls them and they end up kidnapped by robbers who are in over their heads, Benji and his scruffy sidekick come to the rescue.

programme.title: Made In America
programme.desc: When Zora Mathews goes searching for her biological, anonymous sperm donor father, she and her Afro-centric mother Sarah are dumbfounded to discover Hal Jackson, an obnoxious used car salesman on late-night TV; and worse than that, he's white.

programme.title: The Greatest Inheritance
programme.desc: A group of estranged siblings return home to bury their mother and claim their rightful inheritance. They quickly discover she hid the deed to the entire estate, forcing them to work together and ultimately define their future.

programme.title: Just My Luck
programme.desc: Sexy Manhattanite Ashley is known as the luckiest woman around, but after a chance romantic encounter with down-and-out Jake, she realizes that she's swapped her fortune for his.

programme.title: The Plague Dogs
programme.desc: A stunning animated adaptation of Richard Adams' novel, The Plague Dogs follows a pair of dogs, Snitter and Rowf, who escape from a research laboratory and try to survive in the wild with the help of a cunning fox.

programme.title: The Plague Dogs
programme.desc: A stunning animated adaptation of Richard Adams' novel, The Plague Dogs follows a pair of dogs, Snitter and Rowf, who escape from a research laboratory and try to survive in the wild with the help of a cunning fox.

programme.title: The Cannonball Run
programme.desc: The classic comedy with cool stars and even cooler cars! Based on a true race event, Burt Reynolds leads an all-star cast in the ultimate quest to win The Cannonball Run.

programme.title: Vengeance Valley
programme.desc: The sons of a Colorado cattle baron, one biological and the other adopted, resent one another and fight for control of their father's cattle empire.

programme.title: The Lone Ranger: Rustler's Hideout
programme.desc: A group of ranchers capture a notorious outlaw, sparking a child's abduction by the outlaw's gang.

programme.title: Annie Oakley
programme.desc: Choctaw looks to inherit the ranch of the murdered Sam Forbes, but Elaine, a previously unknown niece, appears, making Annie suspicious as the men fall for her seemingly delicate nature.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Eddie's daughter causes trouble for Lucas when two strangers threaten her life after she arrives with criminal information and stolen money.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Town character Brett Conway blackmails Lucas with the knowledge that a young couple Lucas rescued is suffering from yellow fever.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark are stranded in the middle of a desert with very little food or water, and after Lucas is injured, Mark becomes the only hope for their survival.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A dance hall singer asks Lucas to care for her daughter in an effort to hide the baby from her self-righteous, bigoted father.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark runs away from home after his father questions his story about overhearing a plot to rob the bank.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a stranger arrives to marry the town spinster, two brothers who want her land try to discourage him with threats and a beating.

programme.title: Tracker
programme.desc: In this tense action-thriller starring Ray Winstone and Temuera Morrison, Arjan, an ex-soldier, is hired to hunt down a fugitive. But what starts out as easy bounty soon turns into a dangerous game of cat and mouse.

programme.title: Redline
programme.desc: Starring Eddie Griffin and Nathan Phillips. With the speedometer maxed out, a group of exotic car fanatics hit the streets in hopes of winning a life-changing sum of 24 million dollars. Every rule is broken as these drivers.

programme.title: Double Dragon
programme.desc: Evil meets its match in this daring martial arts adventure about two teen brothers out to stop an obsessed tycoon from finding both halves of a mystical talisman.

programme.title: Mary Higgins Clark
programme.desc: After attempting to murder a woman he's convinced tried to kill him in a past life, a man is committed to a hospital for the criminally insane, but a suspicious District Attorney is convinced that the man has killed before.

programme.title: Secret Liaison
programme.desc: One time top public defender returns to LA to try to stop her sister from going to jail for first degree murder, but Samantha also comes face to face with the past she ran away from.

programme.title: Winter Ridge
programme.desc: A young detective is torn apart after his wife ends up in a coma while hunting a serial-killer at the same time.

programme.title: Star Kid
programme.desc: An unpopular boy comes across a fallen meteor containing an alien cybersuit that turns him into the kind of kid he's always wanted to be.

programme.title: Asteroid VS Earth
programme.desc: When a shower of massive meteors threatens Earth's inhabitants with extinction, the worlds greatest minds devise a dangerous plan that will tilt the planet off its axis to avoid the impact.

programme.title: Avengers Grimm: Time Wars
programme.desc: An Evil Queen enlists Rumpelstiltskin to help her send the Avengers Grimm back in time. The Avengers will need to work together if they are to return to the present and thwart the Queen before she can carry out her evil plan.

programme.title: The Adventures of Pinocchio
programme.desc: One of puppet-maker Geppetto's creations, a puppet called Pinocchio, magically comes to life. In order to become a real boy, Pinocchio must go on a daring adventure and learn valuable lessons.

programme.title: A.R.C.H.I.E: A.R.C.H.I.E
programme.desc: Isabel has recently lost her parents in a car accident. Feeling alone and friendless, she befriends a stray robot dog named A.R.C.H.I.E. who can talk, run at blinding speed and has super strength and x-ray vision and they become fast friends.

programme.title: Heaven Must Wait
programme.desc: An American inherits an old village church in England, where treasure is buried. Greedy Mr. Slee scents his opportunity to snatch the treasure. Diggity, a little cherub trying to earn his wings, helps uncover the treasure for the benefit of the village.

programme.title: Encounter: UFO: Abductions
programme.desc: These are first-hand experiences of the most terrifying kind: stories shot through with mystery, fear and endless questions.

programme.title: Encounter: UFO: Air to Air
programme.desc: Being on an aircraft that comes in close proximity to an object that doesn't appear on radar is a scary experience. Who are they and what do they want?

programme.title: Encounter: UFO: Mass Sightings
programme.desc: UFO sightings are at an all time high. What makes these mass sightings incredible is also what makes them terrifying, and what might happen next?

programme.title: Encounter: UFO: Visitations
programme.desc: Sometimes, the mysterious unidentified objects people see in the sky touch down and leave physical evidence behind.

programme.title: Encounter: UFO: Physical Contact
programme.desc: These are the witnesses that have been literally touched by the unknown. Do these cases hold the answer to the central question of UFOlogy?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Join us as we investigate the existence of UFOs and determine the possibility that they may be from Earth.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Explore the increase in UFO sightings that occurred during the spring of 1952.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The apparent suicide of a freshman at uni brings Sara back in contact with an old nemesis.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Hodges presents the 'lab rats' with a series of hypothetical murders.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The team investigates after a cowboy is found dead at a rodeo and his girlfriend is killed

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Grissom and team must investigate the deaths of several witnesses for a grand jury case.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the disturbing death of a three-year-old girl.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A shocking event during an arrest leads the CSIs to a series of bizarre deaths.

programme.title: Scorpion: Nerd, Wind and Fire
programme.desc: On Valentine's Day, Team Scorpion must set aside their romantic plans to help a doctor and pilot trapped inside a helicopter that crashed atop a skyscraper.

programme.title: Scorpion: Dumbster Fire
programme.desc: The geniuses of Team Scorpion turn into knuckleheads and Paige must simplify the science for them, when their mental faculties are impaired during a job to prevent the creation of a black hole.

programme.title: Scorpion: Dork Day Afternoon
programme.desc: Team Scorpion inadvertently crashes a bank robbery in progress and is taken hostage. Also, Sylvester's feelings for Florence grow.

programme.title: Scorpion: Gator Done
programme.desc: Team Scorpion heads to the bayou to track down a cagey alligator in order to stop a deadly mosquito-borne virus, and Paige teaches Walter the concept of the 'white lie.'

programme.title: Scorpion: Foul Balls
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must use their high IQs to win a softball game when the homeland director challenges, with all of their future government contracts on the line.

programme.title: Scorpion: Kenny and the Jet
programme.desc: Paige's maternal side goes into high gear when Team Scorpion must save an unconscious, a hypothermic boy stuck in the wheel well of their airborne airplane.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Honour Roll
programme.desc: After their High School Outreach assignment goes awry, Andy and Chris stumble on the victim of avicious beating behind a nightclub.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Girlfriend of the Year
programme.desc: After a routine speed trap leads to a messy accident on a city highway, Chris and Gail find one of the cars mysteriously empty and quickly realize that itslicense plate matches the one being broadcast in a citywide “Amber Alert”

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Big Nickel
programme.desc: Andy’s attempt to avoid Swarek is thwarted whenbothare assigned to a prisoner transport. When things go awry and theinmate breaks loose, the two officers are led on a cat-and-mouse foot chase through the meandering woods.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: To Serve or Protect
programme.desc: What was to be a routine day for Andy is abruptly put on holdwhen herex-copper father, Tommy, confesses that he might have committed a serious crime during one of his alcohol-induced blackouts

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Judgment Day
programme.desc: There’s a nervous tension in the air on Judgment Day for all therookies at 15 Division who will have to undergo make-or-break assessments by Staff Sergeant Frank.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Takedown
programme.desc: Andy and Chris accidentally screw up one of the biggest drug busts of the decade when they arrest one of the players. In an effort to save the operation, Swarek and Andy go undercover to make the drug buy.

programme.title: The Last Witch Hunter
programme.desc: The fate of the human race hangs in the balance when the Witch Queen (Julie Engelbrecht) rises from the dead, seeking revenge against Kaulder (Vin Diesel), the immortal warrior who slayed her centuries ago.

programme.title: Little Monsters
programme.desc: A nice monster called Maurice (Howie Mandel) lures a boy (Fred Savage) through the floor, into an underworld of prankish goons.

programme.title: Mazes and Monsters
programme.desc: A college student (Tom Hanks) begins to live the role he plays with three friends in a medieval fantasy game.

programme.title: Portrait From Life
programme.desc: An Army Major attempts to find a Jewish girl after seeing her portrait in a London art gallery.

programme.title: Behind the Mask
programme.desc: A newly qualified surgeon takes the blame for his drug addict colleague after the death of a patient.

programme.title: The Ship That Died of Shame
programme.desc: A trio of ex-servicemen begin smuggling innocuous black market items into post-war Britain, but through greed they graduate to more sinister cargo, assisting in the escape of child murderer.

programme.title: JAG: déjà vu (AKA Soldier of Love)
programme.desc: Three Navy lieutenants die by homicide in 11 months around Washington. Harm and Meg investigate

programme.title: JAG: Desert Son
programme.desc: Due to a human error in an exercise, artillery fire injures seven Marines, one of whom later dies.

programme.title: JAG: Brig Break
programme.desc: A sailor has stolen two Stinger missiles from a base. Harm and Meg investigate.

programme.title: JAG: Pilot Error
programme.desc: Two Naval aviators die in a crash of an F-14 while using a new fly-by-wire navigation system.

programme.title: JAG: War Cries
programme.desc: In Lima, Peru, while a boy sneaks into the US embassy at night, a Marine guard stops him.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: The SRU's attempt to take down a crime boss, but when the plan is botched, the boss flees, taking his girlfriend, a criminal Informant, with him.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: An outsider is brought in to perform psychological testing on Team One, but fearing someone will be let go, they start to turn on each other. Meanwhile, Ed is shot on the way to the hospital for the birth of his child.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Team One races to track down Ed's shooter, while his wife has problems delivering their baby.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Team One confronts a rioting crowd after a cop who mistakenly shot and killed a young boy is declared innocent.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Team One goes up against a notorious serial robber who streams his robberies on the internet.

programme.title: God's Not Dead
programme.desc: College philosophy professor Mr. Radisson's curriculum is challenged by his new student, Josh, who believes God exists. Starring:Shane Harper, Kevin Sorbo, David A.R. White

programme.title: Ithaca
programme.desc: With his older brother off to war, fourteen-year-old telegram messenger Homer Macauley comes of age in the summer of 1942.

programme.title: A Good Woman
programme.desc: The seductive Mrs. Erlynne (Helen Hunt) travels to Amalfi, Italy, hoping to win over married aristocrat Robert Windermere. But when Windermere’s innocent wife Meg (Scarlett Johansson) hears of the scandal, she plots an elaborate revenge.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: Delusion
programme.desc: A man with a rare blood type is unwilling to donate his blood in order to save a girl's life, knowing that if he does he will be tormented by supernatural visions of her future.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: Ordeal on Locust Street
programme.desc: A seemingly normal family is hiding a terrible secret: their son has the features of a deformed, fish-like monster.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: Brainwave
programme.desc: Aboard a United States ship in Japanese waters during World War II, Captain Fielding is critically injured.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: Doomsday
programme.desc: A poor, pretty, village woman living in Scotland in the 17th Century is sentenced to be burned at the stake, for the natural death of her lover, the son of an Earl

programme.title: One Step Beyond: Night of the Kill
programme.desc: After being missing from home young Davey Morris tells his parents he was with a friendly Bigfoot type creature. Nobody believes him until they see giant footprints and evidence that the animal has been eating their food.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: The Inheritance
programme.desc: In a seedy bar washed up drunk Michael Barry tells the presenter how an elderly countess to whom he was a gigolo died wearing a beautiful necklace, as did her dowdy companion who inherited the jewelry.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: The Open Window
programme.desc: Artist Anthony March has a premonition of his neighbor's untimely death.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: A Message from Clara
programme.desc: A student taking night classes falls in love with his beautiful teacher. However, he begins to suspect that his dead ex-girlfriend may be using the teacher to try to communicate with him.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: Forked Lightning
programme.desc: Two men who don't know each other find that their lives are intertwined by a strange psychic connection that may end up in the deaths of both.

programme.desc: Goodwin and Sara are lead into a mine shaft where they suffer evil torments.

programme.desc: Mary returns to Buffalo to start a new career path as a flight attendant.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Eric snoops to find out if Matt and Sarah are already married.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: The Camdens pay tribute to Ruthie's pen-pal, a marine stationed in Afghanistan.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Eric and Rabbi Glass cancel Matt and Sarah's wedding in protest of their union.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Two families of different faiths pull together for Matt and Sarah's wedding.

programme.title: 7th Heaven

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: Barry Sullivan guest stars as an eccentric billionaire suspected of killing one of his business associates, but who is afraid to leave his antiseptic yacht even to clear himself of the crime.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: Members of a not-too-legitimate real estate company become victims of a poison contained in a rare shellfish. McGarrett knows that the two men were murdered, but is stumped by the origin of the poison and how it was administered to the victims.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: A convicted murderer escapes from prison and threatens to kill his former girlfriend, so McGarrett sets up an elaborate police protective system around the girl in an effort to capture the killer.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: Danny Williams goes undercover as a sailor to flush out a drug ring operating from a vessel in the U.S. Seventh Fleet.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver helps a promising young hockey player tone down his aggressive style of play and possibly reclaim his position on Team USA, America's ice hockey team.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver is marked for death after stopping the construction of a proposed marina and unknowingly falls in love with the hired killer sent to stop him.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver comes to the rescue of a mountain man who has been framed for murder after agreeing to testify against a chemical company that is illegally disposing of hazardous materials in nearby streams.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver and Jack Dalton come to the rescue of an Indian who is kidnapped by fortune hunters seeking the secret location of a legendary mask.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: An abandoned baby lands MacGyver and Jack Dalton in the middle of a sophisticated counterfeiting scheme.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: After visiting an old flame who's now working as a Park Ranger, MacGyver finds himself in the middle of a grizzly poaching investigation.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When Jim's old girlfriend shows up hoping to rekindle their romance, Alex quickly sets out to win her heart away from her former suitor.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: On the eve of the biggest fight of his career, Tony loses interest in boxing when his girlfriend announces she may be expecting his baby.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie is worried his blind girlfriend will no longer love him if an operation to restore her sight is successful.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: To what lengths will boyfriend Arnie go to win over Elaine's kids? Elaine is in for a surprise when she invites him over to meet her children.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies come to the rescue when Jim tries to convince his family that he didn't squander his inheritance by buying a run-down restaurant.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Latka worries that Simka's wacky behavior might cost her the right to remain permanently in America.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies embark on a frantic race against time when they team up in a wild nonstop drive from New York to Miami so that Alex can see his long-lost daughter on her twenty-minute layover at the airport in the premiere episode of Taxi.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Alex’s romantic instincts are triggered by the sexy voice at the answering service. Her alluring manner prompts him to arrange a dinner date that turns into a big surprise on Taxi.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A pretty girl has John in a whirl, and his determination to meet her prompts the taxi gang to come up with a surefire line that would unfreeze any woman on earth in Taxi.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Elaine fears the worst when the cabbies invite themselves to her party for her highbrow art world friends who have no clue that she moonlights as a cab driver.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica and Tess help the Monroes, whose worst nightmare is realized when they discover that the baby they adopted years ago had actually been kidnapped and now his biological father wants him back

programme.title: Touched By An Angel

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: When a group home for adults with Down syndrome opens in a quiet neighborhood, a bitter older woman, who cares more for her prize roses than for her fellow humans, mounts a campaign to close it down

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: A marriage is thrown into turmoil when expectant parents learn that their unborn child has down syndrome

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: An inner-city youth learns a hard lesson when his basketball idol turns out to be a gambler who is less than a hero

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica and Tess are sent to help Russell Greene’s troubled older brother, Joe (guest star Richard Thomas), turn his life around and take responsibility for a car accident that killed two people

programme.title: 100 Years of Horror
programme.desc: Horror films have used people who didnt need makeup, were actually born disfigured, and managed to turn their misfortune into something of a career.

programme.title: 100 Years of Horror
programme.desc: King Kongs Fay Wray is probably the most famous scream queen of the horror genre, but youll be surprised to see who else made the list!

programme.title: 100 Years of Horror
programme.desc: Men didnt have a lock on the horror movie. There were plenty of frightful females to go around, as youll see in this salute to demonic dames.

programme.title: 100 Years of Horror
programme.desc: Ax-murderers, chainsaw-wielding madman, serial killers, cannibals  theyre all here  and more!

programme.title: 100 Years of Horror
programme.desc: A salute to the great showmen of yesteryear who figured out gory gimmicks to keep audiences glued to their seats  and away from their TV sets!

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Silent Vow
programme.desc: A customer dies from poisoned wine dining at a café, and the waiter falls under suspicion because he was a former chemist.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: Death and the Other Monkey
programme.desc: A cancer research scientist believes his test monkey was not only stolen, but also replaced. He is later found dead from gas; suicide or not?

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Stolen Crime
programme.desc: A man demands to be arrested for murdering his wealthy wife whose death is attributed to natural causes. A valuable coin collection holds the answers.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Silver Curtain
programme.desc: Behind the "silver curtain" spray from a fountain, a man is found dead with a knife in his back. Colonel March is called in to investigate.

programme.title: Matlock: The Mayor (Part 2)
programme.desc: Matlock’s trip to the Windy City to defend a 1960’s radical accused of murdering Chicago’s mayor comes to a head in the second part of this dramatic two-part episode.

programme.title: Matlock: The Black Widow
programme.desc: Matlock takes the case of Ken Wilson, convicted of murdering his wife, whose body was never found. Recently released from prison after seven years, Wilson sets out to find his missing wife but gets arrested again.

programme.title: Matlock: The Other Woman
programme.desc: A disappearing diary, a missing mistress and a preposterous police report pose problems for Matlock when he agrees to defend a psychiatrist, Lucas Forbes.

programme.title: Matlock: The Psychic
programme.desc: Matlock defends a prominent psychic, Jennifer Holtz, who foresees her boyfriend’s murder and is subsequently arrested when he is found dead and Jennifer has no alibi.

programme.title: Matlock: The Thief (Part 1)
programme.desc: A rare-coin dealer invests his trust in Matlock when he’s accused of murdering an employee who was caught stealing valuable coins. Meanwhile, Tyler becomes disgruntled when Matlock hires another private investigator, Linda Hansfield, to work on the case.

programme.title: Matlock: The Thief (Part 2)
programme.desc: While defending a coin dealer accused of murdering an employee, Matlock and Tyler suspect the new investigator Ben hired, Linda Hansfield, is being blackmailed by the real kIller.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: In Cold Blood
programme.desc: On August 4th, 2008, kayakers found a 40-year-old homeless man, Mark Hanley, floating near the marina in Nanaimo, British Columbia. He had been severely beaten and stabbed.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime
programme.desc: After finding the body of a young girl in a stream located in the suburbs of Montreal, investigators strive to retrace a murderer who knew how to use water to his advantage.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Hell's Gate
programme.desc: On June 17, 1994, a tugboat operator is towing a log boom down the Fraser River from Port Coquitlam when he notices something caught up on one of the logs. Upon closer inspection, he discovers a human body.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: In the small town of Carleton Place, Ontario, on the morning of November 10th, 1994, Garry Samuels drove himself and his wife, Barbara Lanthier, into the Mississippi River. He escaped but claimed he was unable to save his wife.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Mr. Big
programme.desc: On the evening of April 21, 2002, six weeks after being assaulted by her boyfriend Michael Bridges, and despite a restraining order against him, Erin Chorney is seen getting into a Ford Taurus known to belong to Bridges’ mother.

programme.title: Andromeda: The Unconquerable Man
programme.desc: Set in an alternate universe where Dylan died and Gaheris Rhade is trying to reform the Commonwealth.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: The group that attacked the Andromeda during the first Commonwealth charter signing returns to wreak more havoc.

programme.title: Andromeda: The Dark Backward
programme.desc: Trance runs through a number of different scenarios, trying to find one in which her crewmates don't die.

programme.title: Andromeda: The Risk-All Point
programme.desc: A more powerful Andromeda ship explodes due to likely sabotage, forcing Dylan's crew to save them.

programme.title: Andromeda: The Right Horse
programme.desc: Beka endangers both her crew and an entire planet when a former love shows up.

programme.title: Andromeda: What Happens to a Rev Deferred?
programme.desc: The Andromeda receives a cry for help from Rev Bam.

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: Stevie discovers that Fiona is lying about being pregnant. Racing to stop the wedding, Stevie is too late - Fiona has fast-tracked the ceremony before Stevie can tell Alex.

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters: The Life of Riley
programme.desc: When brumbies are found shot dead, the Drovers girls suspect Riley, a handsome stranger. Sandra moves back into Killarney, convinced she is carrying out Harry's legacy. Moira and Regan go into a fuel carting business together.

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters: Wild Horses
programme.desc: Stevie and Riley clash over horse training techniques when the pressure is on to have a horse ready for sale in a day.

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters: The Great Temptation
programme.desc: Moira’s husband Hugh returns to Gungellan, wanting her back. Regan saves the day when she discovers that a paratyphoid outbreak on Drovers is the result of Sandra’s dirty work.

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters: Suspicious Minds
programme.desc: When evidence mounts against Stevie, Kate starts to believe that she could be guilty of Harry Ryan’s murder. Riley reacts badly when a local trainer is revealed to be abusing his horses.

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters: Days Of Reckoning
programme.desc: Kate learns a valuable lesson about trusting her heart when she realises she was wrong to go to the police about Stevie.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 8
programme.desc: Caroline returns to find that all is not well at Leopard's Den. Danny has been putting a brave face on his ban but his attempts at helping out around the house are getting on everyone's nerves and Alice is finding his back-seat vetting especially hard.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 9
programme.desc: Danny is delighted to have his veterinary license back again and being back at work is helping to distract him from the impending anniversary of Sarah's death.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 10
programme.desc: Du Plessis is restless after his heart surgery but the family insist he needs to relax. Meanwhile Danny and Alice are happy to have closed down a zoo down that has been mistreating animals.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 1
programme.desc: While on honeymoon in London, Alice discovers that Danny has some final business to do before they can return home to Africa. He's reluctantly arranged to meet his estranged father, Robert, who has recently got back in touch.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 2
programme.desc: Danny is throwing himself into his work after the death of his father, and has applied for the role of State Vet. However, Danny's attempts to involve Thabo in the first phase of the Lion Breeding Project lead to Du Plessis feeling like an outsider.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Death Grip
programme.desc: When a speeding truck crashes into a residential building, officers find the lifeless body of Michael Faast behind the wheel. But he didn’t die in the wreck – he was shot point-blank in the temple.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Eyes of a Child
programme.desc: A loving, churchgoing grandmother is found stabbed to death in her apartment, leaving Joe Kenda to wonder what sort of monster could do such a thing.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Body in the Freezer
programme.desc: A meeting between two businessmen leaves one shot in the face. Things seem cut and dry until Lt. Kenda realizes the “victim” could actually be the aggressor, shot struggling over his own gun.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Where is Claudia Jane
programme.desc: 15-year old CJ Bates is reported missing, and Kenda must investigate the mysterious circumstances behind disappearance of the teenager.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My, My, Merry Christmas
programme.desc: Donald Ott is found shot to death, friends tell police he didn’t have an enemy in the world. But when Lt. Joe Kenda speaks with family, he learns of a relative who might hold the key to the mystery.

programme.title: On the Case: A Wolf in Sheep's Clothing
programme.desc: A compassionate and outgoing woman's dream vacation turns into a deadly nightmare when she crosses paths with a wolf in sheep's clothing.

programme.title: On the Case: Gone in Less Than 3 Minutes
programme.desc: A teenage lifeguard vanishes from a quiet community swimming hole less than three minutes after her mother dropped her off for work.

programme.title: On the Case: Hanging By A Thread
programme.desc: Hillsborough County Florida is in the midst of a horrifying crime spree. Young women are turning up dead every week. Can one teen age girl's bravery bring an end to a vicious killer's reign of terror?

programme.title: On the Case: River of Tears
programme.desc: Paula examines the discovery of a young woman's lifeless body on the bank of a shallow river. A note in her pocket may point to her killer.

programme.title: On the Case: In the Shadows of Home
programme.desc: September 2nd, 2011. 15-year-old Alyssa Otremba called her mom to ask permission to meet a friend to get a textbook to do her homework. It was late in the afternoon, but her mother believed Alyssa could get the book and be back before dark.

programme.title: On the Case: A Tangled Past
programme.desc: When a daughter investigates her sick mother's death, she begins to wonder if the cause of her untimely end was really murder.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: Quinn's brother Colin appears in a non-technological world where Quinn has actually died in infancy and his brother is born a year later.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: After the Sliders check into a haunted hotel, they become ghosts trapped in a howling vortex between two parallel worlds.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The Sliders land on an alternate Earth that has no life, a toxic atmosphere, two moons and a labyrinth filled with Kromaggs.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: Colin (Charlie O'Connell) is captured by a Kromagg (guest star Kristen Dalton), who has been hunting down humans for sport.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: An outrageous talk show host rules the airwaves of the world the Sliders enter, and Quinn goes on his show to contact the others.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: After saving a human woman and her child from the child's Kromagg father, the Sliders discover the child cannot survive on Earth.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The London Nail Bombings
programme.desc: London was brought to a standstill in April 1999 when 23-year-old political extremist David Copeland caused terror with a bombing campaign.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Garry Newlove
programme.desc: Garry Newlove’s wife Helen talks about the events on the night of his murder and the days afterwards, as well as her current work as a peer in the House of Lords combatting anti-social behaviour.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Gemma McCluskie
programme.desc: The harrowing story of EastEnders actress Gemma McCluskie, who was murdered by her older brother in the flat they shared in east London in 2012.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Rose West
programme.desc: With her husband Fred, Rose West brutally murdered ten girls between 1973 and 1979, making her one of the most high profile serial killers in the UK.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Ann Maguire
programme.desc: The tragic story of Ann Maguire, who was stabbed to death by a teenage pupil while teaching a Spanish lesson at Corpus Christi Catholic College in Leeds.

programme.title: Moesha: Girl’s Night In
programme.desc: At a slumber party, Moesha and her friends reminisce (with clips from past episodes) about the past four years together.

programme.title: Moesha: It Takes Two
programme.desc: Kim’s mother, Nikki, is re-entering a journey she started 18 years ago. With Dee’s help, she will be completing her education to receive a high school diploma.

programme.title: Moesha: Had To Be You
programme.desc: An old boyfriend of Andell’s comes back into her life and proposes to her. Moesha tries to keep Andell and Moesha’s Uncle Bernie together before it’s too late.

programme.title: Moesha: The Prom
programme.desc: Moesha’s date for the proms cancels at the last minute. She goes unescorted and meets a handsome mysterious boy who disappears at midnight. She tries to find him, but to no avail.

programme.title: Moesha: A Concerted Effort (Part 2)
programme.desc: Mo cries the lovesick blues on a phone-in radio show. The DJ, feeling sorry for Mo, gives her four free tickets to an upcoming concert.

programme.title: Moesha: The Regulations Of Love
programme.desc: Kim unintentionally lands a boyfriend while trying to make Hakeem jealous.

programme.title: Moesha: There’s No Place Like The Mitchell Home
programme.desc: Moesha runs the Den into the ground while Andell recuperates at the Mitchell home from knee surgery.

programme.title: Moesha: Talk Of The Town
programme.desc: Mo organizes a Town Hall meeting when local merchants and neighbors threaten to shut down the Bomb Bay because of the young noisy crowds.

programme.title: Moesha: Back To Africa
programme.desc: Moesha may have to bow out of the class trip to Africa when Frank invests all of the Mitchell savings in a Saturn dealership.

programme.title: Moesha: Guess Q’s Coming To Dinner
programme.desc: Mo is shirking her duties at home and her grades are falling. Frank blames Q.

programme.title: The Exes: Sister Act
programme.desc: Desperate to impress her perfect sister Jill, Holly invents an alternative lifestyle for herself that quickly spirals out of control. Meanwhile, the guys are riding high on a "special" dish cooked up by Stuart.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil's client, tennis star Chuck Feeney, stays with the guys to hide from the paparazzi. But Chuck the ladies' man turns out to be more of a man's man. Haskell and Holly compete over who can take better care of pregnant Eden.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: When the guys accidentally break Holly's vibrator, they scramble to fix it before she finds out so it doesn't ruin their friendship.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly's boyfriend Paul orders the guys to not hang out with her when he's around. When Holly discovers what Paul did, she's forced to choose between poker night and date night.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Haskell's ex-wife Margo gets amnesia after an accident and stays with Haskell to recover, only she thinks they're still married. Phil and Stuart spend the night in Holly's place and get to know her intimate sleeping behavior.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: When Holly despairs about dating again, the guys secretly create an online dating profile for her and discover what dating is like from a woman's perspective.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Haskell's ex-wife Margo gets amnesia after an accident and stays with Haskell to recover, only she thinks they're still married. Phil and Stuart spend the night in Holly's place and get to know her intimate sleeping behavior.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: When Phil and Holly make a pact to ask their bosses for raises, Phil gets fired. Holly tries to help Phil get his job back. Stuart's integrity is tested when he dates a British woman with repulsive teeth.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: When Holly and Eden date two charming French men who shower them with gifts and glamorous living, they wonder if their dream dates are too good to be true. Phil and Haskell train Stuart on how to confront a bully at the bar.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil opens his own agency and enlists Eden as his temporary assistant to help sign his first client. Meanwhile, Holly hires Haskell as her temporary assistant. Stuart pursues the Yelper who smeared his practice's perfect rating.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly dates a much younger man and Eden questions his motives. Phil and Eden secretly become friends with benefits. Stuart convinces Haskell to pursue a woman he's admired from afar and ends up accidentally stealing her cat.

programme.title: Conmen Case Files: Michael Hammond – The Fantasist Con
programme.desc: He posed as a playboy, a detective, a top surgeon, millionaire property developer, royal confident and boyfriend of Renee Zellweger.

programme.title: Conmen Case Files: Mark Hatton – aka Alex de Rothschild – The Bogus Banker
programme.desc: Posing as a member of the Rothschild banking dynasty, he duped a string of women in the UK and US.

programme.title: Conmen Case Files: The Conman Kid – Aged Just 13
programme.desc: This 13-year-old pulled off almost half a million dollars worth of fraud, often selling goods that didn’t exist.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Double Cross
programme.desc: The investigation of the murder of a shady Montreal businessman takes detectives into the lurid underworld of drug dealers, con men, and crooked lawyers.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Lone Wolf
programme.desc: Two murders of mothers in their own homes send shock-waves through a normally quiet and friendly town where everybody leaves their doors unlocked. The crimes go unsolved until twenty-eight years later.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Vanished
programme.desc: A small town public school teacher fails to arrive for work for the first time in thirty years, leaving an empty house and a baffled community.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Murder on Campus
programme.desc: The bizarre murder of a world-renowned anthropologist over the Christmas holidays shocks staff and students at the university where she teaches.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A building manager finds the lifeless body of a young woman in her first apartment. The case goes cold, then a new forensic tool examines the old evidence. Will science crack the case?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A single mum looking for love vanishes without a trace. Foul play is confirmed when a large pickup truck toolbox opens to her body stuffed inside. Can forensic evidence connect the dots?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Navy lieutenant Lee Hartley is murdered while deployed out to sea. Investigators discover Lee had enemies aboard the ship, but it takes years before they discover what really happened.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: The 1972 rape and murder of nine-year-old Debbie Lynn Randall, who was abducted not far from her home in Marietta, Georgia, is solved five decades later with the help of forensic science.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In Michigan, 1996, a body is found on the side of a road, wrapped in a blanket. The victim is a Sharon Hammack. Detectives use new technology in an attempt to solve this cold case.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: When a young woman is out for a run she is brutally attacked and raped by a stranger. Police use ground breaking genetic genealogy to identify the perpetrator.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A mortally wounded woman crawls to call 911. Her husband gets a hard look from police, but claims to have an airtight alibi. The intricate forensic science of ballistics is brought to bear.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: M.I.A.
programme.desc: Sydney gets kidnapped, but by whom? Nigel, Claudia and Cate will have to go through the list of enemies Sydney has made in the past and deduce which of them is responsible. Cue flashbacks.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Don't Go Into the Woods
programme.desc: Sydney's friend phones to inform her that he's discovered information on the Golden Hawk of Maribor, lost since 1711. Sydney and Nigel travel to Lubjanka to meet him, but he's already gone.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: French Connection
programme.desc: While on a lecture tour with Nigel in Europe, Sydney is contacted by MI5 because she is the only one who can prevent an impending high-level assassination.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Midnight Flight
programme.desc: Germania, ca. 400 AD: an artifact called Gunther's Scepter is sealed in a vault. Kleine Burgh, 2001: Sydney and Nigel are hired to find it using a crystal and a stone tablet.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Executioner's Mask
programme.desc: When a model's face is disfigured after she puts on the mask of a French executioner, Sydney and Nigel will try and find the tomb to reverse the curse.

programme.title: Have I Got a Bit More News for You

programme.desc: Team captains Paul Merton and Ian Hislop are joined by guest host Victoria Coren Mitchell and panellists Rachel Johnson and Ross Noble, all from the worlds of comedy, journalism and current affairs.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: When the body of a child is found, Boston State Police have no leads, but with the help of the National Centre for Missing and Exploited Children, a trace is found.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Edinburgh, October 1977: Christine Eadie and Helen Scott vanish without a trace. The police never stopped hunting for justice, even changing the law to bring justice.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Tracie Andrews purportedly witnessed the murder of her boyfriend, Lee Harvey, in a country lane on the night of 1st December 1996; but all was not what it seemed.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: In late 1992, an attack led to an investigation which would last nearly a quarter of a century. Over time, DNA profiling helped to close a case which detectives feared would never be solved.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: David Jackson left his home to buy beer and cigarettes. He was never seen again. For 15 years his disappearance remained unsolved, until one investigator broke the case wide open.

programme.desc: Holmes investigates a supposed suicide when the widow suspects it's mysterious.

programme.desc: A woman's body is found and investigators have little time and few clues to lead them to a killer who could strike again. Perpetrators try to conceal their crimes, yet savvy investigators can take the most obscure data and recreate a murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Cold Cases
programme.desc: These cases took a decade or more to solve. There's no statute of limitations on murder. As a case turns cold, the clues become scarce, investigators must rely on science to close cold cases.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Without A Trace

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The teams must herd farm animals into their proper pens and decide which proteins and starches they will use next.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Fiery chef Gordon Ramsay puts two teams of aspiring chefs through a series of tough challenges. The teams meet new members before heading into a team challenge in which they must prepare a tasting menu for a dog show.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Cop Killer: The Winchester Assassination

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Devil Inside: John Ernest Cribb

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Michael Kanaan: Shoot to Kill

programme.desc: Known for centuries as Africa's Dark Heart, the Congo is a multi-layered, three-dimensional world, seething with innumerable species. By peeling back the layers, we discover how this vast rainforest works, and expose the hidden lives of its inhabitants.

programme.title: Wildest Indochina: Vietnam: Phoenix from the Ashes
programme.desc: Around 10% of the world's species live in Vietnam, with tropical jungles fit to burst with wildlife. But less than 50 years ago, things were very different. During the war, Vietnam's forests were decimated, but as it always does, life fought back.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Nile: An African Odyssey
programme.desc: The Nile is the longest river in the world. Ancient Egypt, one of the history's most powerful civilizations, depended hugely upon it. Each year, it flooded, replenishing the fields with fertile silt. This automatic irrigation fueled Egypt's economy.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: When Rick Hunter, a renegade cop who takes justice into his own hands, partners with the stunning and rebellious Sgt. McCall, they set out to crack down on L.A.'s slimiest criminals.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Putting the Ork Back In Mork (Part 2)
programme.desc: It could be Mork's last night on Earth when an ancient Orkan elder who looks like a ten-year-old boy arrives with the news that Mork must return to Ork for forecycling because he has picked up too many Earthly ways.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Mork In Never-Never Land
programme.desc: With Mindy depressed about not getting a scholarship, it's up to Mork to stir up some laughs, so he brings home a friend who claims to be the real Peter Pan, with the power to fly as just one of his magical talents.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Dueling Skates
programme.desc: It's the biggest, funniest roller marathon ever when Mork takes to skates for the first time to race a cheating champion skater down a Rocky Mountain peak into Boulder to save the day care center at which he works from destruction.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Mork the Prankster
programme.desc: Spaceman Mork gets so cosmically carried away with pulling practical jokes that he surprises Mindy by assembling her jeep in their living room right over Mr. Bickley's apartment - with disastrous results.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Mork, The Monkey's Uncle
programme.desc: Mork turns the apartment he shares with Mindy into a hilarious hideaway for a young chimpanzee that he kidnaps from the Boulder zoo in the mistaken belief that the animal's mother has been abducted.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Mork's New Look
programme.desc: Mork sends the face-lifting business into orbit when he hilariously rushes to a plastic surgeon to shoot the works after Mindy gives Mork the idea that everyone could use a little improverrent on Mork & Mindy.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Mork and The Bum Rap
programme.desc: Naive Mork puts on his own out-of-this-world telethon to help Mindy raise charity funds, but is such a funny failure at fund-raising that he turns to his own outrageous brand of panhandling to come up with the needed money.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: There's A New Mork In Town
programme.desc: Mork faces almost unbeatable competition for his job as official Earth observer from his Orkan hero, the suave and charming Xerko, who beams to Earth to challenge Mork to an outrageous contest for the right to send reports back to Ork.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Mork Meets Robin Williams
programme.desc: Mork, who has never heard of Robin Williams and scoffs at the idea of resembling him, gets crushed by mobs of fans who think he is the popular comedian, then has a hilarious nose-to-nose encounter with the famous star.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: According to legend, King Arthur was Britain’s greatest king. He led his Knights of the Round Table from Camelot, a spectacular castle, and fought Anglo-Saxon invaders, uniting the country. Leslie Alcock led a team to find Camelot.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: This is the amazing story of how a two amateur explorers discovered one of the world's greatest civilisations, the Maya.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: A fortune in gold is buried in the Rocky Mountains, with only a cryptic map as a clue. For nearly 200 years, descendants of a French expedition have sought it. But the Curse of Treasure Mountain has thwarted all attempts to find the hidden bullion.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: American writer and historan Janice Bennett goes on a quest to prove the Holy Chalice of Valencia - a relic displayed within its cathedral for over 500 years - is the original cup of Christ used at the Last Supper.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard examines the growing UFO Disclosure movement and its attempts to force the US Government to reveal to the public what it knows about UFOs and aliens.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard speaks with the founders of Architects and Engineers for 911 Truth and Firefighters for 911 Truth who present their case that the WTC towers were brought down by controlled demolition on 9/11.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Pergamon and Neues Museums, Berlin
programme.desc: From Vikings who break unbreakable swords to curators who solve the world’s hardest jigsaw puzzle, discover the secrets inside the Pergamon and Neues Museums.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Kunsthistorisches Museum, Vienna
programme.desc: From the alchemy of turning silver into gold to a dance craze that changed history, discover the secrets inside the Kunsthistorisches Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Palacio Real, Madrid
programme.desc: From a clock that runs on witchcraft to a 21st Century king who outfoxes a fascist, discover the secrets inside the Palacio Real.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Israel Museum, Jerusalem
programme.desc: From a scientist who recreates the crucifixion to an ancient amulet that proves Star Trek's Spock is Jewish, discover the secrets inside the Israel Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Uffizi Gallery, Florence
programme.desc: From a famous artist who vanished to a traitorous Nazi who saved the day, discover the secrets inside the Uffizi Gallery.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the State Historical Museum, Moscow
programme.desc: From the duel that killed a genius to Lenin’s Rolls-Royce, discover the secrets inside the State Historical Museum.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: EARTHQUAKES
programme.desc: Earthquakes happen when tectonic plates suddenly slip causing shock waves to shake the surface of the Earth. They occur on fault lines - the most active are the Ring of Fire in the Pacific Ocean and the San Andreas fault on America’s west coast.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: MANMADE
programme.desc: When it comes to disasters, mother nature has mankind beat. However, as mankind expands, evolves and technology advances, it comes with dangerous challenges. When errors are made or unforeseen circumstances occur, the results can be devastating.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: VOLCANOES
programme.desc: Volcanoes are Earth’s geologic architects. They’ve created more than 80 percent of our planet’s surface and their explosive force has crafted both mountains and craters.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: AIR, LAND AND SEA
programme.desc: Planes, trains and ships, our mass transit systems, have had a profound effect on mankind, making the world smaller and more connected.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Waterspouts
programme.desc: In the Florida Keys, George uses a motorboat, a van and small plane to get up close to waterspouts - the nautical cousins of tornadoes. He also meets some of the 25 million alligators that live in the Sunshine State.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Wild Water
programme.desc: In this episode, George investigates the wild side of water in dangerous class 5 river rapids, a flooded cave, and even in the ocean surrounded by massive Great White Sharks.

programme.title: Angry Planet: West Coast Winter Weather
programme.desc: On Canada's rugged West Coast, George ice-climbs a frozen waterfall, uses ski-skins to climb Mt.Garibaldi to an alpine lake, visits a storm-watching lodge on British Columbia's Long Beach, home of winter surfing and massive Pacific storms.

programme.title: Hunting the Edge of Space: The Mystery of the Milky Way
programme.desc: The Mystery of the Milky Way chronicles the history of telescopes, from Galileo's refractor to Newton's reflector and beyond. This episode also looks at recent missions, including the Herschel Space Observatory's examination of the Milky Wa

programme.title: Hunting the Edge of Space: The Ever Expanding Universe
programme.desc: The Ever-Expanding Universe investigates a battery of high-tech telescopes that are joining the Hubble Space Telescope on its quest to unlock the secrets of our universe, a cosmos almost incomprehensible in its size, age and violence.

programme.title: In the Shadow of the Moon
programme.desc: Between 1968 and 1972, the world watched in awe each time an American spacecraft voyaged to the Moon. Only 12 men walked upon its surface and they remain the only human beings to have stood on another world.

programme.title: Inside Outer Space: Episode 8: Extravehicular Activity
programme.desc: Come with us as we explore and unravel the mysteries of what lies beyond our planet Earth. This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see.

programme.title: Wildest Places: Pacific
programme.desc: Wildest Places explores some of the most incredible natural habitats on earth & a diverse range of wildlife.

programme.title: Wild Italy: Top Predators: Italian Bears
programme.desc: No one would have bet on the result of the introduction of seven Slovenian bears, two males and five females, in the woods of Adamello, in Trentino.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: A Helping Hand

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Take Your Daughter to Work Day

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: In Sickness and In Health
programme.desc: Dog is sick as a dog, but he still must lead the hunt for a fugitive named James. James' girlfriend tries to cover for him, but Dog surprises James in his bedroom and leads him away in cuffs.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: If the Shirt Fits...
programme.desc: Beth buys Dog a shirt with an embroidered chicken, but Dog explains he only wears shirts with pictures of either Jesus or a Harley-Davidson. When it's time to go to work, the team goes after Necia, a fugitive with felony charges pending.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Thief Who Stole Christmas

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Rock-a-Bye Bounty
programme.desc: Dog and Beth must go after their former housekeeper, Lisa, who's jumped bond. They know this case will be tricky because Lisa knows everyone in the family. Luckily, Beth's nephew, Jason, is visiting and is quickly put to work as the bait.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Father-Hood
programme.desc: Before Tim heads out for a tough day of bounty hunting, he likes to get in a little quality time with his daughter, Summer Rain.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Cops and Criminals
programme.desc: After giving a rousing speech to an audience of enthusiastic grade-schoolers, Dog catches up with an old friend, Sheriff Tommy Cayetano, to talk business. Dog's got a tough fugitive, named Mia, to catch and Tommy is happy to lend a hand.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Cupid in Cuffs
programme.desc: It's the day before Valentine's Day and love is in the air at Da Kine Bail Bonds--but not for Tapi who has failed to appear in court on theft charges. Dog's plan is to have Leland knock on Tapi's door with a Valentine's gift to draw her out.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Bonds of Love
programme.desc: Dog and Beth are finally getting married! They've been together for more than ten years but Dog is determined, as he puts it, to "marry his common law wife the Christian way."

programme.title: Battle for the Bulge

programme.title: Battle of Britain

programme.title: Battle of Britain - Empty Skies
programme.desc: Tells the story of 19 men and women who were there. Through a series of filmed interviews their stories have been preserved, allowing them to tell the part they played in the nation's defence in their own words creating a unique collection of accounts.

programme.title: Battle of Britain: The Race For Radar
programme.desc: On the brink of war the Germans mount a daring Zeppelin spy mission. Had the Luftwaffe spies discovered Britain’s greatest secret?'

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Brittany & Bryon

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show

programme.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions: The Lost Continent (Atlantis)
programme.desc: As the Nazis rose to power, Himmler and the SS were convinced Atlantis could be found, and instigated a series of archeological expeditions seeking uncover and exploit its secrets.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions: Walking with Witches
programme.desc: Convinced the medieval witch trials were a Judeo-Christian attempt to exterminate the Aryans, Himmler established a special team led by Reinhard Heydrich to build a database of medieval German witchcraft practices.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions: The Quest for the Holy Grail
programme.desc: Revealing the work of a secret team of scientists and scholars established by SS leader Heinrich Himmler to scour the globe seeking the origins of the Aryan race and collect ancient artifacts.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions: Into the Mountains (Tibet)
programme.desc: Revealing the work of a secret team of scientists and scholars established by SS leader Heinrich Himmler to scour the globe seeking the origins of the Aryan race and collect ancient artifacts.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions: Cro Magnon

programme.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions: Runes
programme.desc: Runes are the letters of an ancient Germanic writing system that harkens back to a mythological age filled with heroes, magic, and mystery.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Masters of Bluefin (Special)

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Wildfire

programme.title: Wardens: Never Ending Day

programme.title: Wardens: Angry Like a Moose

programme.title: Wardens: River Rescue

programme.title: Wardens: Failure To Tag

programme.title: The Falcon Lake Incident
programme.desc: Aliens visit Earth often; Canada's 1967 Falcon Lake UFO incident stands out. Canada's frequent sightings make it enigmatic.

programme.title: Alien Reptilian Legacy
programme.desc: Researchers reveal the presence of a supreme and nefarious interdimensional intelligence that has been manipulating mankind for centuries. Interviews with experiencers and alien abductees expose a sinister agenda behind the alien presence on Earth.

programme.title: Ancient Alien Origins
programme.desc: Researchers discover that aliens from another world assisted in the evolution of man and were the genesis of a very real bloodline that remains intact today.

programme.title: Abducted by Aliens: UFO Encounters of the 4th Kind

programme.title: Little Bear

programme.title: Little Bear

programme.title: Little Bear
programme.desc: When Pompon wants all the attention to focus on him, he puts a bandage on his finger, pretending that he has a cut. But Rita will not be fooled. She knows exactly what he's up to.

programme.title: Little Bear
programme.desc: Pompon would love to have a little brother as his parents are always busy. He thinks that if he had a brother, they would be able to play all the time. As a result, he goes in search of a little brother in the forest.

programme.title: Little Bear
programme.desc: To surprise Agnes the stork, who will soon be migrating to a warm country, Pompon and his friends are putting on a little play depicting her many journeys. But despite an attack of stage fright, Pompon ends up saving the show.

programme.title: Little Bear
programme.desc: While Pompon is having fun playing doctors with Rita, he discovers that his dad is recycling their old junk. There's no way he's letting his broken old robot become a scarecrow. Doctor Pompon will make it better with sticking plasters.

programme.title: Little Bear

programme.title: Little Bear

programme.title: Little Bear

programme.title: Little Bear

programme.title: Little Bear

programme.title: Little Bear

programme.title: Little Bear

programme.title: Little Bear

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children who have a barrel organ. A man turns the handle and the children dance. A musical box appears.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are playing with their favourite things, they stop to watch an international Christmas insert. Lots of clouds appear in Teletubbyland and begin to snow.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies take turns to stand on a hill, in front of the house, next to a tree under a cloud. Andy Brown and some children visit some giraffes.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch two children looking through a telescope at the moon. In Teletubbyland, Po is going round and round.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Laa-Laa wants to play indoors. She asks Po, Dipsy and Tinky Winky to play indoors too, but they want to play outdoors.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies and a group of children see Tamzin Griffin pretend to be Funny Lady and tell the story of the naughty snake.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Some children go to the woods to see some bluebells. Po is walking in Teletubbyland when a bluebell appears. Po shows Laa-Laa the bluebell and then one by one more and more bluebells appear.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch two girls climb a hill and look at the view. In Teletubbyland, Po looks for Tinky Winky. Over the hills, between the trees and along the path, but she couldn’t see him.

programme.title: The Big Dino Dig
programme.desc: In this new episodic special Bob and the team tackle a big new job – building a dinosaur-themed fun park. With the help of park manager Tony Toberomi and new dumper truck Rubble, the team constructs a roller coaster, slide, train ride and flying ride.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Roley is desperate to help with the apple harvest, but there’s not much a road roller can do to help. Farmer Pickles, meanwhile, asks Bob to build him a new press to make apple juice. Roley tries to help Spud collect a load of apples

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The team are building Sunflower Valley’s first geodesic dome. As Wendy has organised the dome and knows how it all fits together, Bob suggests that she might like to take charge of the job. Reluctantly Wendy agrees.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Scoop and the machines are in Sunflower Valley setting up Wendy’s caravan. Scoop contacts Muck to find out where Bob has got to. Muck explains that they haven’t left Bobsville yet because they’ve lost Bob’s Dad!

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The team are taking a break from building so they can tidy-up all the left over materials from around the Valley. Farmer Pickles asks Bob if he’ll put together Scruffty’s new kennel. Bob’s got a busy morning but agrees to build the kennel later on.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Farmer Pickles has a new family of Pigs being delivered to his farm and Bob must build a new home for them. In the meantime, Farmer Pickles places the pigs in an old Barn to keep them safe.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob has been making secret early morning trips to the school where Mrs Percival has been giving him salsa lessons, as he wants to impress everybody at the town dance that night.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: It is Wendy’s birthday, but she insists she doesn’t want any fuss – such as a surprise party. She heads off to start the day’s work, laying a Heritage Trail around the town, and Bob reveals to the Machines that he is not planning a party.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob has a day off and he takes a trip to Farmer Pickles farm to take some photographs for the town photography competition. Wendy, meanwhile, has been called to the school hall where a pipe has burst, threatening the competition.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The team are all ready to set up Mr Sabatini’s bakery opposite the windmill so it’s close to the flour. Bob promises a surprise when they get there, and who should roll out from behind a bush but Benny!

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Today Bob and the team have a very exciting job to do. They are building a bridge over the river to where Mr Sabatini’s new bakery will be. Bob promises Scrambler that he can be the first machine across the bridge.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Mr Fothergill has a nasty case of dry rot, so Bob and crew will have to use some smelly chemicals to fix it. As these will affect Mr Fothergill’s allergies, he goes to his sister’s for the day. But she doesn’t get on with Hamish, his pet parrot.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: After a stormy night, Wendy has to mend a chimney pot at Mrs Potts’, while Bob repairs a drainage pipe for Farmer Pickles. A wire fence has been blown away at the farm too, but fixing the pipe takes priority.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Today’s the day that the machines get to build their brand new shelter. It’s going to be built into the side of a hill and made using found materials. Lofty, who slept outside at the old yard, decides that he’d like a place in the new shelter.

programme.title: When Bob Became a Builder
programme.desc: It’s a beautiful day in Sunflower Valley and Bob and his machine team are building a new picnic area at the beach. Dizzy, Lofty and Scrambler are clearing stuff that’s been washed up on the beach, while Benny has a great time digging with Scoop and Muck.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: An observation tower is going to be added next to the Visitor’s centre to provide a scenic view of Sunflower Valley. The scaffolding is raised and Roley prepares a path to connect the tower to the Dome.

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "Fight or flight"
programme.desc: In the finale of season two, the team spend the night at a former RAF base. Bangs on request, footsteps, and more are encountered; and the venue has a strange effect on some of the team, with one AYH member getting the fright of their lives.

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: Unfinished business
programme.desc: The Are You Haunted..? team are back with the first episode kicking of a brand new season. Three more venues are put before the team, only one will be investigated: but which one?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: A different time
programme.desc: In this episode, the AYH team visit a building that delivers much more than initially meets the eye. Poltergeist activity, unexplained noises and vocal sounds are all experienced...but at which venue?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: Something behind me!
programme.desc: The team are back once again. This episode sees the intrepid team joined by two guest investigators - Kevin Ling and Michael Roberts - as they investigate a reputedly haunted venue bigger than most!

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: Who's down there?
programme.desc: The team investigate a sprawling venue where apparitions, noises, and an unsavoury entity have been reported. Sara has an experience she won't forget. Dale gets a headache. And the entire team is mystified by a particular incident that keeps occurring.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Stone Cold
programme.desc: In 2004, Brendan Percy was found dead of hypothermia and dehydration in a sub alpine area above Oamaru in suspicious circumstances.

programme.title: Sensing Murder
programme.desc: 19-year-old Joan Wech left New Zealand for the bright lights of Sydney. But the first step on her overseas adventure would be her last. Was this a robbery gone wrong, a savage random attack or a revenge killing by a jealous ex-lover?

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Vanishing Point
programme.desc: In 2003, 32-year-old mother of three Sara Neithe vanished from the Hauraki Plains. Neither Sara nor her car have been seen since. Police suspect that Sara has been murdered but without a crime scene, they have been unable to advance the case.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Long Way Home
programme.desc: 25-year-old Te Puke woman Judy Yorke was a devoted single mum who adored her kids. When she missed her daughter’s fourth birthday party, her family knew something was terribly wrong and reported her missing.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Last Orders
programme.desc: In 1993, devoted father Kevin O'Loughlin came face to face with the dark side of sunny Nelson when he was brutally stabbed to death after a night out on the town.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Paranormal State: I Am Six
programme.desc: Laura has felt oppressed by a violent spirit ever since she heard a chilling EVP in the fall of 2007. The 26-year-old claims she's been beaten, choked, even forcibly submerged.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Shadow Caster
programme.desc: PRS investigates an Alabama home where clients, Georgiana and her two daughters, are so terrified, they moved out after only 18 months. They have seen shadow figures, been touched and have a recorded EVP stating, "Look at me, get out of here."

programme.title: Paranormal State: Laws of Attraction
programme.desc: When Paula's young autistic son Michael, with limited verbal skills uttered the words "Go away scary dead boy" -- it sent a chill up her spine.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Night Terrors
programme.desc: Ryan leads his team to one of the most haunted places in the US to confront their fears and solve a paranormal mystery. Aside from the alleged spirits of dead prisoners, something even darker may be lurking inside West Virginia State Penitentiary.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Southern Discomfort At Sweetwater Mansion
programme.desc: PRS heads to the Deep South to investigate a haunted Antebellum Mansion in disrepair. The caretaker and volunteers at the property have many a tale to tell of paranormal activity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: First Contact
programme.desc: Washington State, a hotbed of unexplained paranormal activity. Between possible UFOs in the sky and winged creatures in the woods, Ryan and his team are forced to face their fears and deal with the question: Are we truly alone in the universe?

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Anniversary
programme.desc: Ever since a close-knit Kentucky family moved into their new home, they've been visited by the spirit of a young girl.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Boy Pushed Me
programme.desc: Bruce and Danielle are terrified by an EVP recorded in their Indiana home stating "Kill them." Even more chilling, their toddler son survived a fall out of a window only to tell his parents, "Boy pushed me."

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Sickness
programme.desc: Something is making Lisa and her family sick. Is it natural or paranormal? Ryan and the team uncover the tragic history surrounding Lisa's home--with shocking connections to respiratory illness.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Darkness Falls
programme.desc: Ryan leads his team to one of the most haunted places in the US to confront their fears and solve a paranormal mystery. Aside from the alleged spirits of dead prisoners, something even darker may be lurking inside West Virginia State Penitentiary.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Hill House_PT2
programme.desc: Part one saw the team seemingly getting stalked by something, and in this part it shows its hand.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Village Church Farm
programme.desc: A museum like no other, this small collection of antiquated buildings is said to be the home of several spirits. The team get more than they bargained for as objects move; strange noises are caught on camera and the best EVP response to date.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Old Nick Theatre
programme.desc: Once a prison and a police station and now a theatre the Old Nick is famous for its unexplained occurrences. Fred decides to summon up some extra help while objects move and something wants to make itself known.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Black Country Living Museum
programme.desc: The team have a whole village to investigate with results that amazed the all. With a playful spirit communicating through the Ouija board and the EVP machine at the same time the team seem to have their first two-way conversation with the dead.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Lyceum Theatre
programme.desc: The Lyceum Theatre in Crewe is known for its paranormal activity and in this episode the team take the fight right to phantoms that lurk in its darkness with some frightening consequences.

programme.title: A Haunting: Angels And Demons
programme.desc: Maryland single Mom Kathie Sheats hopes life will change for the better when she marries her boyfriend Brian. But "something" inside her house has other ideas. Spiritual warfare literally breaks out...taking over Kathie's mind, body and soul.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Exorcism Of Cindy Sauer
programme.desc: Georgia single mother Cindy Sauer is finally getting back on her feet after the sudden death of her husband. But as she is recovering from her loss, nightmares and dark shadows haunt the family and mark the beginning of something far worse.

programme.title: A Haunting: Vision Of Terror
programme.desc: When Stacy Stowe hears ghostly sounds in her home, she assumes it's the spirit of her late husband who died in a tragic car accident. But a psychic warns Stacy that she will find no peace until she closes the portal that has opened the door for evil.

programme.title: A Haunting: A Haunting in Ireland
programme.desc: The Fahey family’s new addition stirs up psychic energy of a crime committed years ago.

programme.title: A Haunting: Death's Door
programme.desc: Victoria Dane was accidently overdosed before an emergency surgery and flat-lined for more than seven minutes. While recovering, she starts to notice unusual occurrences. She fears that she’s opened a door to a paranormal world that can never be shut.

programme.title: A Haunting: Ashes To Evil
programme.desc: Soon after moving in a large apartment in Hampton, Tennessee, Amelia’s family can’t shake the feeling that they are not alone. An evil entity lurks in their dream home and is targeting family members. They turn to paranormal investigators for help.
